title: aglaia lancifolia
intro: Aglaia lancifolia, also known as the lancet-shaped aglaia or lancifolia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aglaia lancifolia include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
